# Nexus for Schools

> Zimbabwe's closed inter-school handball and netball competition network — fixtures, live scoring, standings and player verification, powered exclusively by Scholastic Services.

Nexus is a schools-only platform. Schools, student athletes and identity verification are sourced directly from Scholastic Services. There are no public sign-ups; accounts are provisioned for school staff (coaches, sports directors, HICs, scorers) and regional administrators across Zonal, District, Provincial and National pathways.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Nexus network, live activity and partner schools.
- [Live Scores](/live): Real-time handball and netball scoreboard across active fixtures.
- [Fixtures](/fixtures): Upcoming and completed inter-school handball and netball fixtures.
- [Schools](/schools): Directory of vetted Zimbabwean schools competing on Nexus.
- [Inter-School](/inter-school): Competition pathway — Zonal → District → Provincial → National.
- [Sports Day](/sports-day): One-day, multi-event meets with live points table per school.
- [Broadcast](/broadcast): Broadcast character generator and graphics for live coverage.

## Optional

- [Practice Scoring](/practice): Off-record scoring sandbox for officials.
